name: imove-partner-portal
description: iMove Partner Portal & CRM — PostgreSQL + Prisma

scripts.dev: concurrently "nodemon server/index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.start: prisma db push && prisma db seed && node server/index.js
scripts.build: cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install
